narration: You see '12 months zero interest' and hit accept. But that offer has a hidden timer — and most people don't know what happens when it runs out.
visual: SVG store checkout screen showing '0% APR FOR 12 MONTHS' in green; animated bomb icon springs in at top-right corner of screen; 'LOOKS LIKE A DEAL / IT'S A TRAP' text fades in below; red badge '73% OF SHOPPERS GET HIT'

narration: Here's the thing — two kinds of zero interest exist. Waived means it's gone forever. Deferred means it's hiding, quietly building in the background the whole time.
visual: Two side-by-side boxes spring in: left box green with checkmark labeled 'WAIVED — INTEREST GONE FOREVER'; right box red with dollar signs labeled 'DEFERRED — QUIETLY BUILDING'; callout 'MOST STORE OFFERS = DEFERRED' fades in below

narration: Miss that payment deadline and every month of interest backdates all at once — all twelve months. It doesn't phase in. The whole bill lands in seconds.
visual: Horizontal timeline bar animating across 12 month dots; bomb icon springs in at month 12 marker; dark red panel appears: 'MISS BY ONE DAY → ALL 12 MONTHS HIT AT ONCE'

narration: On a $2,400 TV at 26.99% APR, one missed deadline means a $648 surprise bill on top. Your TV just went from $2,400 to $3,048 overnight.
visual: SVG TV labeled $2,400 on left; plus sign fades in; red bill labeled '$648 INTEREST BILL' springs in; equals sign and large '$3,048' text grows in with spring; red banner 'NOT THE $2,400 YOU PLANNED'

narration: Four words in the fine print tell you everything: 'if paid in full.' Any offer with that phrase is deferred. Safe offers say 'no interest' — full stop.
visual: SVG document with blurred gray lines of text; 'IF PAID IN FULL' phrase highlighted in red and springs into view; two comparison labels below: red 'DEFERRED' with 'IF PAID IN FULL' vs green 'WAIVED' with 'NO INTEREST'

narration: Set a calendar reminder for month eleven, then pay it off before the clock runs out. One alarm protects you from a $648 gut-punch. Don't let the timer win.
visual: SVG calendar with red alarm dot on month 11; piggy bank SVG with fill level animating upward; red CTA banner 'ONE REMINDER SAVES $648'; dark follow-for-more banner at bottom
